title: adonis flammea var. pallida
intro: Adonis flammea var. pallida, also known as the pale Adonis or white Adonis, is a variety of flowering plant in the genus Adonis. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, known for its white flowers with yellow centers and its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
